title: Bengal election 2026 LIVE: 72.5% voter turnout in Magrahat Paschim, 72.36% in Diamond Harbour in repolling at 15 booths
description: Bengal election 2026 LIVE: Voter turnout of 72.5% has been recorded in Magrahat Paschim and 72.36% in Diamond Harbour till 3pm, where re-polling is being held across 15 polling booths.
